name: toggl
description: Reads and writes time entries, projects, clients, tags, tasks, and users through the Toggl Track API.

risk.read: external Toggl Track API read of time-tracking and workspace data
risk.write: external mutation of Toggl time entries, projects, clients, tags, and tasks; no destructive-admin or elevated-scope actions modeled
risk.approval: create/update actions execute without approval (low-risk, reversible via a follow-up write); delete_* actions are irreversible and should be gated by the caller's own reverse-ETL approval policy
